# G.A. Tucker PI

> Licensed California Private Investigator with 27+ years of experience. Professional investigation services including background checks, surveillance, infidelity investigations, missing persons, and legal consulting. CA License #PI188351.

G.A. Tucker PI is a professional private investigation firm based in Southern California. Greg Tucker is a licensed private investigator with Master's degrees in Forensic Psychology, Criminology, and Legal Studies. Available 24/7 for confidential consultations.

**Contact:** 909-964-8976 | gatuckerpi@gmail.com

**Credentials:**
- California PI License #PI188351
- M.S. Forensic Psychology - Alliant International University
- M.S. Legal Studies - Washington University School of Law
- M.S. Criminology - Kaplan University
- Member: California Association of Licensed Investigators
- Member: World Association of Detectives

**Service Area:** All of California, focusing on Southern California including Los Angeles, Orange County, San Diego, Riverside, and San Bernardino counties.

**Pricing:** $211/hour for ongoing services. Flat fees available for research-intensive cases. Free initial consultation.

## Docs

- [About Greg Tucker](https://gatuckerpi.com/about): Meet the licensed California PI with 27+ years experience and advanced degrees in forensic psychology and criminology
- [All Services](https://gatuckerpi.com/services): Overview of all private investigation services offered
- [FAQs](https://gatuckerpi.com/faqs): Frequently asked questions about private investigation services, licensing, confidentiality, and pricing

## Services

- [Background Checks](https://gatuckerpi.com/background-checks): Comprehensive background investigations including employment verification, criminal records, and personal history research
- [Private Investigations](https://gatuckerpi.com/investigations): Full-service investigation for civil and criminal cases including surveillance and evidence gathering
- [Consulting Services](https://gatuckerpi.com/consulting): Trial preparation, jury selection, witness interviews, and case analysis for attorneys
- [Risk Management](https://gatuckerpi.com/risk-management): Threat assessment and mitigation strategies for businesses and individuals
- [Infidelity Investigations](https://gatuckerpi.com/infidelity): Discreet surveillance and evidence gathering for suspected cheating spouses
- [Child Custody](https://gatuckerpi.com/child-custody): Evidence gathering for family court proceedings to protect children's interests
- [Missing Persons](https://gatuckerpi.com/missing-persons): Locate lost family members, runaways, or individuals using advanced techniques
- [Behavioral Profiling](https://gatuckerpi.com/profiling): Forensic psychology services for legal strategies and criminal analysis
- [Hollywood Fixer](https://gatuckerpi.com/hollywood-fixer): Discreet crisis management for celebrities, executives, and Fortune 500 companies
